slide1.text: Imagine getting into Coinbase, or Binance at day one, that's exactly what BFX is offering right now in its presale.
slide1.name: Clay Bro

slide2.text: Hold BFX and earn daily USDT rewards from trading fees, even when you're not trading, it's not just a token, it's your key to passive staking income.
slide2.name: Crypto Volt

slide3.text: Forex, indices, stocks, ETFs, even options — you can trade them all in one place. It's the first platform of its kind.
slide3.name: Crypto Dealer

slide4.text: Every time someone trades on this platform, you will earn — the more BFX you hold, the higher your rewards will be

whitepaper.heading: BFX Whitepaper
whitepaper.description: Explore the whitepaper to learn how BFX powers a next-gen trading ecosystem. Discover its key features and advantages, and see how BlockchainFX is bridging the gap between blockchain and traditional finance by creating the crypto industry's first trading super app.

wallet_section.title: BFX Presale
wallet_section.description: $BFX is the world's first cryptocurrency backed by a global multi-asset trading platform, where holders receive USDT rewards anytime someone trades, even during the presale.
wallet_section.step_1_description:
• Connect your crypto wallet
  • Choose your preferred payment method
  • Enter the amount of BFX you want to buy
wallet_section.step_3_description:
Earn BFX and USDT rewards from day one!


  • Staking rewards are paid out every 24 hours and automatically added to your wallet.
wallet_section.step_4_description:
Congratulations! You'll be able to claim your tokens with one click on this website once the presale ends.

Thanks for being part of the BFX journey!

staking_rewards.title: Staking Rewards
staking_rewards.description: Your BFX and USDT rewards will appear on the dashboard 24 hours after you stake your coins.

earn_on_section.title: Earn Daily With BFX
earn_on_section.description: BFX holders earn daily staking rewards in USDT and BFX, powered by BlockchainFX trading fees. Every time someone trades on the app, holders get rewarded. The more BFX a person holds, the more they earn — up to a maximum of 25,000 USDT per day.

how_does_it_sec.title: How It Works?
how_does_it_sec.subtitle:
BlockchainFX is a global exchange where users can trade crypto, stocks, forex, ETFs, and more.
Every time someone trades, 70% of the trading fees go toward the $BFX staking pool, buybacks, and token burns.
Staking rewards are based on how much BFX a community member holds and are capped at $25,000 USDT per day.

staking_rewards.title: BFX & USDT Staking Rewards
staking_rewards.description: 50% of all fees collected are automatically distributed to BFX holders who stake their coins.

buybacks.title: Daily Buybacks
buybacks.description: 20% of the fees are used to buy back $BFX daily, helping boost demand and support the price.

burn.title: Burn BFX Coins
burn.description: Half of the bought-back tokens are permanently burned, gradually reducing the supply of $BFX.

and free trading credits. Exclusively available during the presale.

questions.question: When will I get my Founder's Club NFT?
questions.answer:
• You'll receive your Founder's Club NFT automatically after purchasing the required amount of $BFX.
  • The NFT will appear in your personal dashboard and can be claimed once the presale ends.
  • To access the dashboard, connect the same wallet by clicking 'Connect Wallet' in the top right corner.

questions.question: When will I get my Bonuses?
questions.answer:
• Your BFX bonuses will be instantly added to your dashboard
  • To access your dashboard, click the 'Connect Wallet' button

questions.question: Can I get an NFT with multiple purchases?
questions.answer:
• Yes, you can buy $BFX in smaller amounts to reach the total required.
  • For example, buying $200 worth of $BFX five times will earn you the Novice NFT (valued at $1,000).

questions.question: Can I upgrade my NFT?
questions.answer:
• Yes, you can upgrade multiple times during the presale.
  • You'll receive rewards and the NFT for the highest level you achieve.
  • After the presale ends, upgrades will no longer be possible.

tooltip_text.line1: For example, buying $1,000 of $BFX gives you the Novice NFT.
tooltip_text.line2: Spend $1,500 more to upgrade to Advanced.
tooltip_text.line3: You can keep upgrading until you reach the final Legend NFT.

less_than_section.title: Bridging Crypto and Finance
less_than_section.description: Crypto makes up only 0.87% of global trading volume in 2024, averaging $84.3 billion daily. Meanwhile, the Forex market alone handles $7.5 trillion per day. This gap presents a major opportunity for BFX to connect crypto users with the world’s largest financial markets.

standout_section.title: Standout Features
standout_section.description: Cryptocurrencies from exchanges have historically performed well due to their active user base, platform revenue, and ongoing marketing. BFX, the first token from a multi-asset trading platform, offers unique features that bring real value to the market.

what_is_section.title: What Makes BFX Different?
what_is_section.description: BFX is BlockchainFX's native coin, offering a unique opportunity to be part of a fast-growing global trading platform with the ambition to become one of the world's leading trading networks.

token_allocation_section.title: Token Details
token_allocation_section.description: The token allocation is structured to reward early supporters the most

articles.description: BlockchainFX is quickly becoming the go-to trading platform in 2025, offering access to 500+ assets and rewarding benefits for users.
BlockchainFX is set to revolutionise the trading landscape as the first all-in-one crypto trading platform.
BlockchainFX is the first trading app that lets users earn daily USDT passive income directly from trading fees.

Roadmap_section.From Fintech Startup to Global Market Le: From Fintech Startup to Global Market Leader

reviews.text: Finally, a platform that gets it right! I traded CFDs, bought APPLE stocks, sold them for GBY, and grabbed some $PEPE, all within 30 minutes. Highly recommend it for both beginners and pros!
Trading on 9 different windows and having access to dozens of trading analytic tools and risk management is giving me a long-term edge over the competition trading on other platforms.
BlockchainFX gives you endless trading opportunities. This just makes sense since markets are interconnected. Finally, there's no need to waste time switching between brokers.

The best part about BlockchainFX? The deep liquidity across all assets. I've never had an issue filling large orders, even with niche crypto pairs. This is exactly what serious traders need—speed, reliability, and a wide range of markets all in one place.
BlockchainFX has completely leveled up my trading game. It's super intuitive, lets you access multiple markets simultaneously, and offers lightning-fast transactions. A huge win for crypto!
That's exactly what we needed. A trading broker designed to bridge Crypto with Forex, ETFs, and stocks, giving you real access to the markets with deep liquidity.

faq_section.title: FAQs
faq_section.description: Find answers to some of the most common questions.

faqs.question: What is BlockchainFX?
faqs.answer: BlockchainFX is an international multi-asset trading platform offering a wide range of trading opportunities, including Forex, Crypto, ETFs, and more, with advanced technical tools and risk management features.

faqs.question: What is BFX?
faqs.answer: BFX is the native token of the BlockchainFX platform, enabling early access, staking rewards in BFX and USDT, and providing access to premium features, as well as participation in the platform's ecosystem.

faqs.question: What is a crypto presale?
faqs.answer: A crypto pre-sale is an early opportunity to purchase a new cryptocurrency or token before it becomes publicly available, typically at a significantly lower price than the official launch price on exchanges.

faqs.question: What is the goal of the presale?
faqs.answer:
The community event is dedicated to selling all pre-sale allocated tokens to accelerate platform growth and expansion. These funds will be strategically allocated to development, marketing, and securing top-tier exchange listings for BFX.

Our goal is to reach 100,000 active daily traders and generate multi-million dollar daily trading volume before the official launch. At the same time, we're building a strong, loyal, and engaged community, rewarding early supporters with discounted tokens, and maximizing awareness for the BFX launch.

faqs.question: Where can I see my tokens?
faqs.answer: You can view your tokens in your dashboard wallet. Simply click 'Connect Wallet' in the top right corner and connect the wallet you used for the purchase to see your BFX balance.

faqs.question: Are my tokens safe?
faqs.answer: The safety of your tokens during the pre-sale is 100% guaranteed through our smart contract.

faqs.question: How to claim your BFX?
faqs.answer: Your tokens will be transferred to your wallet automatically after the presale ends. You don't need to do anything.

The Ultimate

the_ultimate_section.description: Experience the best trading platform with advanced features and user-friendly interface.

footer.description: Be part of the next-gen trading ecosystem and join the fast growing BFX movement.
footer.disclaimer:
Cryptocurrency may be unregulated in your jurisdiction, and its value can fluctuate, leading to potential gains or losses. Any profits might be subject to capital gains or other taxes, depending on your local laws. The content on this platform does not constitute an offer, recommendation, or financial advice to buy, sell, or engage in any cryptocurrency transactions. You are solely responsible for assessing whether a transaction aligns with your personal goals, financial circumstances, and risk tolerance. We strongly recommend consulting trusted and licensed legal, tax, or financial professionals before making any decisions.

Trading cryptocurrencies carries significant risks, including the potential for partial or total loss of your funds. Thorough research is crucial. BlockchainFX does not guarantee any performance, outcome, or return of capital for any cryptocurrency mentioned on this platform. By using this platform, you agree to our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, and any applicable token sale agreements. The platform's content is not intended for use in jurisdictions where its distribution or use would violate local laws or regulations.

slide1.title: Bridging Crypto and Finance
slide1.description1: Crypto makes up only 0.87% of global trading volume in 2024, averaging $84.3 billion daily.
slide1.description2: Meanwhile, the Forex market alone handles $7.5 trillion per day. This gap presents a major opportunity for $BFX to connect crypto users with the world's largest financial markets.

slide2.title: The Gateway to Global Markets
slide2.description: Launching a new trading platform takes a lot of time and resources. On the other hand, buying $BFX takes seconds and lets you earn every time someone trades.

cost.title: Cost
cost.tooltip: This is the budget needed only to launch the platform in certain jurisdictions, excluding staff and marketing.

team.title: Team
team.platform: Experienced multilingual team working in shifts, 24/7, 365 days a year.

workScope.title: Work Scope
workScope.platform: Capital Requirements, Marketing & Branding, Liquidity Providers, Risk Management Team, Customer Support, Technology Infrastructure, Partnerships, Development, Hiring and Managing Staff, and more.

slide3.title: Designed For Exponential Growth
slide3.description: BlockchainFX is a community-powered trading platform that rewards BFX holders daily. As the platform grows, so does the token — creating a powerful cycle of growth and engagement. Studies* show that incentivized communities can grow significantly faster than others, and BFX is designed to maximize that potential.
slide3.source: (*Source: Harvard Business Review, When Community Becomes Your Competitive Advantage, 2020)

biggest_buy.title: Biggest Buy-In Competition
biggest_buy.description: The top 10 BFX presale buyers will receive a share of a 100,000 USD prize pool in $BFX. This competition is our way of thanking those who contributed the most and played a major role in the growth of the BlockchainFX ecosystem.
biggest_buy.note: The list is updated weekly and is based on transactions made during the BFX presale.

reviews.name: DANI
reviews.description: Joined their waitlist and got early beta access to the trading app in December. It felt like Binance on steroids and I just Knew it would blow up, so I bought in 5–6 times over the past weeks. Already made $3,75k USDT from staking, and the coin hasn't even launched yet. Big up!

reviews.name: ERIKS
reviews.description: I got in super early when BFX launched their initial staking pool, barely anyone was in, so rewards were split between just a few of us. Made over $8.5k from staking and got $2k USDT airdropped. Left the rest untouched. Tbh I'm Still in shock… this is pure alpha.

reviews.name: S.Z
reviews.description: I'm already earning solid rewards just from staking, but what I'm really betting on is what $BFX can do after the presale. Why pay fees on platforms like Coinbase when you can get paid here, and even trade stocks? Everyone's going to switch. BFX will be the next big thing. It's a no-brainer.

crypto_exchange_sec.title: Pioneering Crypto Exchange
crypto_exchange_sec.description:
BlockchainFX is redefining the future of trading with an all-in-one decentralised platform where users can trade anything, anywhere —while maintaining full control of their assets.

Currently in beta and awarded 'Best New Crypto Trading App of 2025', BlockchainFX has already received outstanding feedback from early users. With the $BFX presale, holders can now be part of the next major global trading platform.

gateway_section.title: The First Crypto Exchange That Pays Its Holders
gateway_section.description:
Instead of draining users with high fees, BlockchainFX cuts them by up to 70%. Half of all fees are
paid to $BFX holders as daily staking rewards. The platform puts the community at the center,
ensuring users are rewarded at every stage of the project's success.

other_exchanges.title: Other Crypto Exchanges
other_exchanges.high_fees: High fees with no rewards for users
other_exchanges.users_excluded: Users are seen purely as profit generators for the exchange and are completely excluded from its growth and success.
